title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. incurrens
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. incurrens is a subspecies of the common hawkweed, a perennial plant in the dandelion family with yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. incurrens include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as potential antiviral and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is not widely studied or recognized by modern medicine.
